meaning: n.蔷薇花蕾,妙龄少女,<美>初入社交界的少女
examples: I've always loved the original Rosebud Salve, but this is even better!
On Rosebud, Mr Osborn is waiting for adequate transmission and a power-purchase agreement.
Another Rosebud project is an environmental study; the American burying beetle is of special concern.
This is due to the almost habitual applications of lip balms such as Carmex or Smith's Rosebud Salve.
The clever idea of giving Santa a family and a Rosebud-like backstory turned into this noisy, bloated, humorless comedy.
